# extract_features { #natural_features.extract_features }

```python
extract_features(
    stimulus,
    *,
    features=None,
    bundle=None,
    budget='default',
    feature_params=None,
    format='features',
    table_format='long',
    include_objects=True,
    include_placeholders=False,
    video_fps=10.0,
    registry=None,
)
```
